race.description: Cuolahans Big Day Out Maiden Plate
race.comment: LOWESTOFT (6) was heavily bet to win at Wangaratta over this trip but a post-race vet examination revealed cardiac arrhythmia. Brought strong provincial form to that and is back after 3 weeks with the blinkers off again. In a leading barn and is well-placed to win. FIRE TYPE (2) peaks and is knocking on the door. Raced a $2.5F at Pakenham last time over this trip and faded from the pace. Prepared to forgive that, and with average luck he can make the finish. PRINCE ZIOTTA (3) is a likely improver, as is MESSAGE BANK (7), who has the blinkers on today and may appreciate the longer journey here.
